chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1011 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 28.10.2016. Mr. Kashif Hussain Agha, Advocate alongwith petitioner. Ms. Shaista Shah, State Counsel a/w ASI Tharo Khan of P.S Jamshoro. Respondents No.6 & 7 present in person. = Today, the learned State Counsel files comments on behalf of respondent No.5-SHO P.S Jamshoro, wherein he has mentioned that the Police has acted in the matter in accordance with law and that a FIR was lodged on the complaint of petitioner as ordered by the learned Additional Sessions Judge. It is further stated that Police is not siding any of the parties. Today, the private respondents No.6 & 7 are also present and according to them, it is the petitioner, who has usurped their rights. However, they have undertaken that they will seek their legal remedy in accordance with law. On this statement and the written statement filed by the learned State Counsel on behalf of official respondent No.5, this petition is disposed of, while observing that private respondents shall not cause any harassment to the petitioner and that the official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE Shahid
